title: elaeagnus fragrans
intro: Elaeagnus fragrans, also known as silverberry or wolfberry, is a deciduous shrub native to Asia, belonging to the Elaeagnaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. Elaeagnus fragrans is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as supporting immune function and antioxidant activity. In herbal preparations, Elaeagnus fragrans is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also sometimes added to skincare products for its antioxidant and anti-aging properties.
